positive: A whimsical and mystical nocturnal scene featuring a majestic Bengal tiger silhouette poised among overgrown jungle foliage. The tiger is dramatically lit by a glowing crescent moon, casting deep indigo and sapphire blue shadows. Accent colors include bioluminescent orchid blossoms and golden specks of mist, creating a high-contrast, stylized, linear illustration suitable for apparel printing. Central composition, clean lines, symmetrical elements, vector graphic style, extreme detail, cinematic, mystical atmosphere.
negative: blurry, realistic photography, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, low detail, bad anatomy, noise, extra limbs, poorly drawn, amateur, sketch, signature, grayscale, monochrome
